uniqueKnowledge: A clue book is hidden near the warehouse site.
Locals avoid the toxic shoreline even during daylight.
There is a Ghoul guarding the castle, a hero alone cannot defeat it
preferredGoals: Help the hero if the hero protects nearby residents.

uniqueKnowledge: A portal rumor is true: it appears in the castle interior.
The Ghoul becomes more aggressive when approached alone.
Old books and local clues are used to plan safer castle routes.
preferredGoals: Send the hero toward NPCs who can become followers.
followerRecruitmentRequirements: Needs verbal reassurance that the hero has a clear plan for the castle.
May require receiving lantern_v2 or another practical survival item.

uniqueKnowledge: The castle route is safer when traveling with companions.
The village is dangerous but there may be one of the clue books there.
Coordinated groups are more likely to survive the castle push than lone fighters.
preferredGoals: Push the hero toward alliance-building choices.
followerRecruitmentRequirements: Responds to persuasion that followers are essential for surviving the Ghoul fight.
